name: Reviews List
description: A tidy stack of every review shoppers can skim in seconds and trust in less.

name: Reviews Compact
description: Pack dozens of glowing reviews into a minimal block that never steals the spotlight from your product.

name: Reviews Grid
description: Show off photos, videos and five-star moments in a staggered grid that feels alive.

name: Review Snippets
description: Drop bite-sized reviews beside the Add to Cart button — the exact moment trust turns into a sale.

name: AI Reviews Summary
description: An AI-written recap of every review, so shoppers get the verdict without scrolling for ten minutes.

name: Cards Carousel
description: A smooth, touch-friendly carousel of review cards that keeps attention longer than a static grid ever could.

name: Classic Carousel
description: Your best reviews looping on autopilot — the tried-and-true slider every storefront asks for.

name: Dynamic Carousel
tagline: One reel to rule them all.
description: Video, image and text reviews rolling side by side in a single, scroll-stopping reel.

name: Gallery Carousel
description: A vibrant, visual-first gallery that puts your best photo and video reviews front and centre.

name: Slide Deck Carousel
description: A stylish card-deck carousel that mixes visual and written reviews with magazine-level polish.

name: Testimonials Carousel
description: A rotating wall of customer quotes — the closest thing to a personal referral on your storefront.

name: Videos Carousel
description: Turn customer videos into a scrollable showreel that shoppers actually stop to watch.

name: Star Rating Badge
description: A crisp star badge that shows your average rating anywhere — collections, PDPs, even the footer.

name: rayt.ca Medals
description: Unlock trust medals — Top 10%, Verified, Gold — and wear them proudly next to your reviews.

name: Verified Reviews Counter
description: Show the live count of verified reviews so every visitor sees the proof the moment they land.

name: All Reviews Counter
description: A clean counter of every published review and their average score — social proof in a glance.

name: Pop-up Reviews
description: A gentle pop-up that spotlights your best reviews at the perfect scroll-depth — trust exactly when it's needed.

name: Floating Reviews Tab
description: A dockable side tab that keeps every review and an invite to leave one just a thumb's reach away.

name: Questions & Answers
description: Let shoppers ask anything — and give your team, and your community, a beautiful place to answer.

name: Happy Customers
description: A dedicated reviews page that boosts your search rankings while it showcases every fan you've earned.

name: UGC Instagram Shopping
description: Pull the best user-generated content from Instagram into a shoppable grid that turns scrollers into buyers.

name: Customer Accounts
description: Let customers write, manage and revisit reviews directly from their account and order pages.

name: Write a Review
description: A mobile-first review form designed to turn gratitude into submissions in under thirty seconds.
